changes.text: Linked changelog commit hashes directly to GitHub repository.
Corrected historical commit hashes in system logs.
Implemented Markdown Export for better documentation sharing.
Added PWA support with Service Worker for offline-first persistence.
Enhanced Drag and Drop: Re-engineered reordering logic to provide real-time fluid previews and eliminate snapping.
Externalized changelog management to a dynamic JSON fetch system.
Included course titles in Tree copy output (CODE - Title format).
